chapter_voice_summary: BG 2.14's voice is instructional — Krishna anticipates an objection (the Self-knower still feels cold/heat) and answers with a precise discipline (titikṣā). The engineering layer matches this register: the on-call scenario is described instructively, the discipline is named precisely, the falsifiability and counter-example carve out the misreadings. The chapter's didactic-corrective arc is preserved — neither consoling nor motivational. The Friday-afternoon on-call scenario delivers concreteness without abandoning the instructional voice. Voice consistent.
